subtasks.title: Remove from Packaging and Set up neatly in workspace. Connect Power, Monitors, Mouse, Keyboard and Ethernet.
Turn on device. Skip Siri, Skip Apple ID.
Go to your AssetMost instance and log in with admin credentials
/form new device
subtasks.instructions: Creates the record; the tag it issues IS the hostname.

subtasks.title: /hostname
subtasks.instructions: Applies the hostname to the machine - the tag issued by the step 1 form. Set Info fields by hand: 1 = assigned user, 2 = asset tag ID.

subtasks.title: /encryptdisk
subtasks.instructions: FileVault2 on; the recovery key escrows to the registry - no paper, no txt.

subtasks.title: /banner
subtasks.instructions: Company login banner - PolicyBanner.rtfd.zip from the installers share.

subtasks.title: /remotemgmt
subtasks.instructions: Remote Management sharing on - full access only for administrators.

subtasks.title: /screenlock
subtasks.instructions: Screen saver after 5 minutes idle, lock + require password immediately, no password hints.

subtasks.title: /wifioff
subtasks.instructions: Wired production subnet only. Wi-Fi re-enabled only for users with administrative permission.

subtasks.title: /mdm Jamf auto
subtasks.instructions: Company-sponsored laptops and smart devices enroll in Jamf Pro. Retail-bought Macs: switch this line to manual mode, or adopt into ABM first (see the Apple Configurator SOP).

subtasks.title: /chrome
subtasks.instructions: The only approved third-party browser - installed straight from Google, no MDM needed.

subtasks.title: /install mac synologydrive
subtasks.instructions: Synology Drive Client - keep its installer on the share (Mac folder).

subtasks.title: ClamXav - deployed by Jamf after enrollment
subtasks.instructions: Antivirus. Verify it landed and is running.

subtasks.title: /printer OFFICE-PRINTER 192.168.1.50
subtasks.instructions: EDIT the name and IP to your office printer. Driverless IPP covers most modern printers; install the vendor driver if it does not print.

subtasks.title: Copy the company font library to Users > Shared
User account set with Standard permissions (no admin)
Assign manual IP on the production/management subnet; add the company search domain
subtasks.record: IP recorded on the device (Assets > Devices - the IP column)

subtasks.title: Assign the user password: 12 characters, mixed case, alphanumeric + special
subtasks.record: Stored as a login on the person - never on paper

subtasks.title: External hard drives / USB flash drives encrypted
Additional apps / subscriptions per user function
/servers smb://LA-SERVER/Jobs smb://ARLINGTON-SERVER/Jobs
subtasks.instructions: EDIT THE URLS to the real LA and Arlington servers. Mounts each and adds a login item so they reconnect at login.

subtasks.title: Set up local backup - decision pending (Carbon Copy Cloner is the leading candidate)

meta.why: Every office production laptop/desktop gets this baseline before it reaches its user. An imaged system (Basic Setup) exists for quick deployment; this SOP is the full path and the audit trail.
meta.scope: All office production laptop/desktop systems (macOS) before deployment to the end user.
meta.how: Work top to bottom. The machine steps generate the bootstrap script at /onboard - run it with sudo on the Mac; it reports each step back to this checklist.
meta.tools:
Imaged system (Basic Setup) for quick deployment
PolicyBanner.rtfd.zip on the installers share (Mac folder)
Canon 6065 vendor driver if the office printer needs it
meta.safety:
System is locked from further changes without IT / Management approval.
Update the asset inventory before deployment - new system, or reassignment to a new user.
